items.claim: Jean Paul Leosani is lying about his listed height of 5'11".
items.quote: Jean Paul Leosani has got to be lying about his height.

items.claim: Jean Paul Leosani and Soyon Co are undersized for the welterweight division.
items.quote: it is a bit small overall for welterweight.

items.claim: Jean Paul Leosani has previously competed at lightweight.
items.quote: The man has fought at lightweight multiple times

items.claim: Felipe Franco has a better body of work than Levi Rodriguez Jr.
items.quote: I feel like we've seen more from Felipe Felipe Franco at this point compared to Levi Rodriguez Jr.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr.'s win on the Dana White Contender Series is invalidated by a positive steroid test.
items.quote: That [ __ ] got overturned. This man popped for steroids.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. performed poorly against Johnny Pereira before the injury stoppage.
items.quote: he was getting out struck on the feet against Johnny Pereira.
